title: Make a learning plan
subtitle: Plan small daily practice.
overview: A2 Core builds practical control: daily tasks, simple stories, short writing, listening repair, and clearer spoken output.

sections.title: A2 core focus
rows: I will listen for ten minutes every morning.
我每天早上会听十分钟。
At night, I will repeat five useful sentences.
晚上，我会重复五个有用句子。
I will listen in the morning and repeat at night.

items.en: I will listen for ten minutes every morning.
items.zh: 我每天早上会听十分钟。

items.en: At night, I will repeat five useful sentences.
items.zh: 晚上，我会重复五个有用句子。

items.en: I will listen in the morning and repeat at night.
This is practical A2 English I can use in real life.
items.zh: 这是我能在真实生活中使用的实用 A2 英语。

items.en: I will change the details and say it about myself.
items.zh: 我会改变细节，说成关于我自己的内容。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: I will listen in the morning and repeat at night.

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Can you give one more useful detail?
lines.zh: 你能再给一个有用的细节吗？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: At night, I will repeat five useful sentences.
lines.zh: 晚上，我会重复五个有用句子。

items.en: I will listen for ten minutes every morning.
items.zh: 我每天早上会听十分钟。

items.en: At night, I will repeat five useful sentences.
items.zh: 晚上，我会重复五个有用句子。

items.en: Make a new version with your own place, time, or reason.
items.zh: 用你自己的地点、时间或原因造一个新版本。

items.en: Read it aloud until it sounds calm and natural.
items.zh: 大声朗读，直到听起来平稳自然。
